\cventry{Graduate Research Assistant}{Adaptive Systems Lab}{August 2021 -- Present}
  {Northgate University of Technology}{Millbrook, OH}{%
  \item Advised by Dr. Priya Nair
  \item Designed and implemented novel safe reinforcement learning algorithms for autonomous aerial vehicles
  \item Deployed real-time control policies on embedded hardware platforms under strict computational constraints
  \item Published and presented research at top-tier conferences and journals in machine learning and robotics
}%
